headline: Airbnb (ABNB) Stock Weighs DCF Upside Against Rich Earnings Multiple
summary: If you are wondering whether Airbnb stock still offers value at current levels, this article walks through what the numbers actually say rather than relying on headlines or hype. Airbnb's share price last closed at US$141.88, with returns of 6.9% over the past month and 6.7% year to date. The stock is up 6.1% over the past year and 13.4% over three years, but has declined 7.3% over five years. Recent coverage of Airbnb has focused on how the business model scales, the regulatory backdrop in...

headline: Airbnb (ABNB) Faces Chicago Lawsuit Over Alleged Illegal Short Term Rentals
summary: Chicago authorities have filed a lawsuit against Airbnb, alleging the company facilitated illegal short term rentals in the city. The case focuses on compliance with local regulations in a major U.S. urban market that is important for Airbnb’s global platform. The legal action raises fresh questions around how NasdaqGS:ABNB manages city level rules and relationships with regulators. Airbnb runs a global marketplace that connects guests with hosts offering short term stays, often in...
